title: Extend convergence evidence profiles for resilience
goal: Version the convergence protocol so target criticality, affected failure domains, degraded mode, common-mode risk, recovery and return-to-primary evidence affect closure.

approval.note: User explicitly authorized full registration and implementation on 2026-07-18; live-state, claims, diff review, CI, merge and runtime evidence remain mandatory.

acceptance.assertion: A backward-compatible versioned protocol adds resilience classification without mutating v1 history.
Change risk and target criticality remain separate axes and deterministically select evidence.
Applicable high-risk closure requires recovery, bounded degradation, cleanup and return-state evidence.
Missing recovery, stale criticality, common-mode contradiction and split-brain evidence block closure reproducibly.

does_not_establish: authority outside the listed source systems
